author: Britney Muller
title: Google's AI Mode: Here's what matters for SEOs and marketers
content: Britney Muller published detailed research insights on Google's AI Mode in March 2026. Key findings include: Citation reputation matters significantly, with LinkedIn posts dominating citations for 'best seo in the world' queries and Neil Patel's older content heavily cited for 'top seos' and 'top seo agencies' queries. She discovered that Google's AI Mode uses advanced citation mechanics, frequently linking to pages with referenced text highlighted (similar to featured snippets). Notable differences between mobile and desktop results were also identified. Her research revealed that brand queries get hyperlocal results, with searches like [Disney] and [NASA] triggering brand-related event results near the user's location.
